game.short_text: Murderous point & click comedy horror. BEST GAME of Scream Jam 2023.
game.title: Midnight Bloodbath

details.title: Midnight Bloodbath
details.description:
Become the protagonist of this Horror Comedy Flick inspired by all your favourite classic Horror B-Movie and British Comedy like "The Bloodbath at the house of Death". Bruce the demon has been summoned with the order of freeing the House of Terror from its new residents: the Grump family. Learn how to use Bruce demonic powers and find creative way to achieve your goal in... 




at the house of terror


OF SCREAM JAM 2023
JUDGE FEEDBACK:
"A humorous, satirical and nostalgic point-and-click adventure in the vein of Maniac Mansion. The elemental powers bring a fun supernatural twist to the puzzles, and I enjoyed figuring out how to dispatch the occupants without too much drama. The writing is light hearted and funny, and the visuals are very well done. Easily a highlight of the jam for me. Great work!"

•Classic retro interactive point and click puzzling
•Original pixel art, soundtrack, and voice acting
•80s horror-comedy vibes with plenty of gore, death, and screaming


Navigate the mansion and use Bruce's demonic powers to vanquish the inhabitants.
 Telekinesis - Interact with the environment (Bruce doesn't have thumbs)
 Hell's Fire - Light it up with the fires of hell
 Frost Bite - Chill out and cool things down
 Spark Hex -  Electricity is really just organized lightning










DuckMadeOfWood - Team Lead, Concept, Design, Art, Voice
hankworx - Music, Audio,  Voice
 Estelle Son as Mrs Grump 
Chris Bain as Adam



This game contains some adult language, depictions of gore, themes of the occult, negative stereotypes, and two pixels that represent female nipples.
This is a work of fiction. Any similarities to any characters, living or dead, is completely coincidental.


Created in a week for Scream Jam 2023

game.title: It Paints Me
game.short_text: An artist struggles to paint his final work.

details.title: It Paints Me
details.description:
Every night, you awaken in your studio and paint your masterpiece.  
Or, at least, you try to. 
Oh, if only your muse would return. 
If only lifting your brush didn't fill your fingertips with agony. 

Note: Web version may be laggy. For the best experience, please download and play on your OS!
It Paints Me is a short visual novel about art, love and pain. It features:
 3.9k words
 3 endings
hand drawn artwork 
original musicpartial voice acting

Originally created in one week for Scream Jam 2023. 
Note: Due to people not reading the instructions and downloading the outdated version instead of the current build, the jam version is no longer available.
Content warnings:  
Violence, death, body horror, chronic illness, grief, dysfunctional relationships.
Misophonia note: Contains squelching/squishy sfx

Art, music, story, programming & sound design by Endysis. 
Casting by Phebe Fabacher
Voice Mixing by Mark Mullens
Cast

Marie - Shellah     
Sam's Mother - Maria CorcobadoSam's Father- Ethan Grant

game.title: Blackwood
game.short_text: 1920s Art Deco horror adventure!

details.title: Blackwood
details.description:
Blackwood is a horror adventure framed within a vintage 1920s Art Deco poster. As you explore, collect newspaper clippings detailing the story behind what you're seeing.It's the 1920s, and Lower Manhattan is ruled by Mortimer Orion Blackwood, robber baron and steel executive. Climb from the bottom to the top as you discover the secrets behind Blackwood's success, but be careful - it appears there's more to the man's story than meets the eye.
Made for the Scream game jam! Enjoy!!Download the zip file. 
Unzip the file (keep the contents of the unzipped file IN THE SAME FOLDER! The project won't work if you try to only run the executable in a separate folder). 
Run the executable! (For Windows, if antivirus is prompted, just click "more info" then "run anyways.")
Enjoy!

game.title: Ner
game.short_text: You simply must descend

details.title: Ner
details.description:
Sickly damp air fills your lungs as sporadic artificial light strains your sun-starved eyes. The dim corridors ahead of you are bathed in aluring darkness, drawing you deeper and deeper into the unknown as your ability to recall the surface world recedes. With every step, a creeping anxiety grows, whispering about a haunting presence that calls this place home.

Ner is an atmospheric horror game made for Scream Jam 2023 set in a desolate underground complex where your only option is to descend further and further into the dark unknown.

game.title: MÆRE
game.short_text: Try to sleep

details.title: MÆRE
details.description: CONTENT WARNING: Horror Theme, Off-screen Violence, Mild Nudity.Music and Sound by FreeSound.org, Ovani Sound, GameDev Market and Chris Gray MÆRE II is out now! MÆRE II: Hypnagogia by Chris Gray MÆRE is an experimental horror game I made for Halloween this year about trying to fall asleep in a haunted room. The game takes around 7 minutes to complete. The game is best experienced with headphones. The game is a little dark as I was trying to reproduce the feeling of being in a dark room and staring out trying to make out different shapes. But I've tried it on 4 different monitors and I think its possible to see whats happening. HOLD SPACE to close your eyes. RELEASE SPACE to open them. Use ARROW KEYS to look around. Keep your EYES CLOSED and FEAR METER low to fall asleep. If you hear something in the dark it will raise your FEAR METER, as will seeing an entity. It is difficult to fall asleep if you are afraid. So make sure you keep your FEAR METER low. You can reduce your FEAR METER by looking around the area where ou heard the noise coming from, this will reassure you that the area is safe. Ghosts thrive on attention. So if you do see something that should not be there. Don't pay attention to it and eventually it will leave you alone. When asleep you may dream. Nothing can hurt you in a dream. But you may still feel the sensation of pain.

game.title: Coelacanth
game.short_text: A psychological horror game about drowning.

details.title: Coelacanth
details.description:
You're drowning and your past is flashing before your eyes in fragmented scenes. How did this happen?
Made for Scream Jam 2023
This is my very first solo game and I'm really proud of what I accomplished in such a short time. I kept it simple so I could go all out on the art.
There's two endings, depending on the choices you make.

This game deals with the following subjects:
Drowning and thalassophobia in generalImplied sexual assaultAbusive romantic relationshipsMurder and violence

They're not pictured or too explicitly described, but they are part of the story. Please exercise caution!

details.title: The Spaceman's Memory Box
details.description:
The Spaceman's Memory Box is a top-down, pixel-art interactive fiction game, based on the short story of the same name by L. Mauro - published in Close to Midnight: An Anthology of New Short Stories. It was built using Bevy 0.11 and submitted as an entry to Scream Jam 2023.
How to play:
Explore three flats on a London council estate - search through drawers, check out objects and investigate your surroundings for something to borrow for your game of "catalogue".
Controls:
W,A,S,D  - move character, change dialogue options
E - interact with objects, advance text, select dialogue options
Note: we've uploaded a fix for the occasional crash that happened when selecting an option!
Credits:
Lolly - original short story, game script/dialogue
0xD21F - programming
sazzlepops - art, music, level design

details.title: Demon Diner - Scream Jam 2023
details.description:
WARNING: Gory content, disturbing content, flashing texts, loud noises
Being a prep cook is hell -- especially when you're working off a lifetime of sin in Purgatory's kitchen. Every time the bell rings, a hungry demon is looking for a snack -- and if your cooking isn't up to snuff, that snack might end up being you. Survive as long as you can in the worst kitchen imaginable.
Some additional notes in case the ingame hints are cryptic:
You can put lamb and beef in the oven, potatoes and calamari in the fryer, and can chop lettuce and tomatoes at the cutting board. You can't swap any of those preparations. You interact with different stations with E, and open doors with SPACE. When you hear a bell, check the ORDER counter for a new demon to get their order. Their order will then be placed as a ticket in the PICKUP counter. Bring the foods they ask for to the counter and place them on the plate, and then click the ticket the order belongs to. At the beginning of the game the customers don't come too often, so you might have to wait a bit. Sorry! Didn't have much time to balance things.
Created by Rian Shinozaki, Nicholas Wong, Leo Lui, Brandon Tremble, and 'Midnight Syntax.'

details.description: In "Hoot 'n' Spook" you step into the feathered shoes of an owl gravekeeper tasked with protecting your haunted graveyard from a mischievous mob of ghostly spirits and mischievous pumpkin monsters. To save your beloved resting place, you'll need to embark on a ghostly adventure, uncover cursed gravestones, and, with a dash of courage and a sprinkle of owl wisdom, exercise those pesky spirits. It's a whimsical and spooky escapade where you must outwit, out-hoot, and out-spook your spectral foes to ensure that the graveyard remains peaceful and your feathers unruffled!Controls: [WASD] to moveMouse to control camera[SHIFT] to sprint[E] to check gravestones[SPACEBAR] to fight ghostMusic by @officialYiMusic

details.title: Forsaken in Caves
details.description:
Counting the rings of a tree is intimidating. It's older than you.  Much older. You can count ring after ring, year after year, to the generations before.
Counting the rings of a tree is ultimately reassuring. You cut it down. It's dead. You are not.
In the war between trees and men, men win.
Counting the layers of stone is terrifying. The entire varied and bloodied history of the human race is but a few inches deep.
In the war between stone and men, stone wins.

Controls
WASD to move
Mouse 1 to shoot
Mouse 2 to aim
Left Shift to sprint

game.title: One Shot
game.short_text: Can you find it before it figures out you only have one bullet?

details.title: One Shot
details.description:
-------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

A game by Johnny Scott for the 2023 Scream Jam.

I recommend playing the download version, but the browser version should work perfectly fine as well.
-------------------------------Summary------------------------------------------
One Shot is a game that places you in a not so ideal situation. 
Trapped in a dark room.
With something that wants nothing more than you dead.
And you only have one bullet.
Can you Survive?
------------------------------Controls--------------------------------------------
E to interact.
Mouse to look around.
Left Click to shoot.
Escape exits to main menu (you might have to press it twice if your playing in browser)
------------------------------Credits:--------------------------------------------
Various Unity Asset Store Assets and sounds from FreeSound.org
"Revolver" (https://skfb.ly/oxYYH) by Kamesh.Hamare is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

"Industrial Button" (https://skfb.ly/oBOBF) by Zeppelin is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

"Monster" (https://skfb.ly/oLPsB) by Shedmon is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

"Suitcase with combination lock" (https://skfb.ly/oIKIt) by swedishboy is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

"Bullet 9 mm" (https://skfb.ly/6QSxx) by Y2JHBK is licensed under Creative Commons Attribution (http://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/4.0/).

I hope you enjoy playing this as much as I enjoyed making it.

game.title: Hereafter (2023)
game.short_text: You're dead, now what?

details.title: Hereafter (2023)
details.description:
~ SYNOPSIS ~
           The Nameless Protagonist died suddenly, leaving behind a life full of unfulfilled dreams and aspirations. Now, the protagonist is stuck in the spirit world, where he must find a way into heaven while a dangerous evil entity lurks to take his soul.
~ GAMEINFO ~
           “Hereafter” is a short horror game where the player must find and enter a bright door to progress. The game also allows players to read people’s thoughts or listen to their conversations by pressing “Mouse Left Click”. However, players must be careful as an evil spirit lurks in the game.

~ CONTROLS ~
MOUSE LEFT CLICK                                                         to InteractWASD Keysto WalkHold Shiftto RunESCto Pause game

game.title: The Delve (V.3)
game.short_text: A Scary Cave Story. (1 of 5)

details.title: The Delve (V.3)
details.description:
Welcome to the start of a small series of stories that your two favorite story tellers will entrance you with around the nightly campfire.
 Meet Alex and Dennis, 2 Stoners in the woods telling each other scary stories. Eventually, they will be in a scary story of their own.... But for now, up first, Dennis's Story. First up on the block:

In this story, your friend goes missing in a nearby cave, and you must look for him. Once inside, you realize there is something else in there with you. Can you make it out of the cave and survive the night, or will you be eaten alive? You can choose to attempt to run from the creature, or you can choose to hide in the tunnels and find another way out.

Controls:
F - Flashlight (It has a Battery. Leaving it off for a moment will recharge it)Shift - RunWASD - MoveE - InteractMouse - Move headC - Crouch M - Map (When you pick it up)

game.title: Voice in Fire
game.short_text: An atmospheric horror game where you must navigate using only your sense of hearing.

details.title: Voice in Fire
details.description:
An owl took away your eyes, and in this dark forest, it became even darker than usual. Wolves are crying to the moon (she does not care about their tears).The lumberjack sings his grim song. Something dark crawls in the night. Can you find your way home? Do you even have a home?
VOICE IN FIRE is an atmospheric horror game built on idea of navigating in complete darkness using alternative senses of the player.Navigate through sounds to avoid dangers and monsters and to find your home. Listen carefully to the crackling of the campfire, and you'll surely make it out...

Use WASD and the mouse to move.This game is not easy, but if you are careful, you will succeed. 
This is the first game I made entirely by myself so I will very much appreciate any comments and reactions.Unpack Voice in Fire.zip and run Voice in Fire.exeUse WASD and mouse to move

game.title: Ghastly Guppies
game.short_text: Fish tycoon with a spooky twist

details.title: Ghastly Guppies
details.description:
This is a submission for the 💀Scream Jam 2023💀
Dive into the enchantingly eerie depths of Ghastly Guppies, the ultimate spooky fish tycoon game! Your mission: to care for and collect a spine-tingling array of Skele-fish, Ghost Fish, and Angler Fish. Amp up the fun by playing mini-games on your phone to earn the riches you need to expand your aquatic empire. Can you master the art of fish care and become the reigning tycoon of these spooky underwater realms? The countdown to Halloween excitement starts now in Ghastly Guppies!Gameplay:Buy fish, earn money through games on your phone, keep your fish alive! Your score is determined by the lifespan of your fish and the breed. You can only play as long as your phone has battery. 
Levels:- Classic: Beat your score before your battery depletes. The longer your fish live, the better your score! Fish breeds also affect your score.- Chill: No timer, no score. Simply earn some cash, feed your fish, and have a good time expanding your aquarium.
Instructions:General:- Click on the tank to feed your fish (you can only feed them if you're not on your phone). Don't let your fish die! Maze & Dodge minigames:- Use WASD to control your character. Collect coins and avoid ghosts! You can only collect your coins once you reach the green point.Feeling Lucky:- If you're feeling lucky, check out the app and you might win $100 in game!
Credits:Gamedev & art: keahe (me!)Royalty free music & SFX found online :)

moreInfo.Author: meshell
moreInfo.Tags: aquarium, Cute, fish, Halloween, Pixel Art, Singleplayer, Tycoon
